title: Fab Lab Custom Promotional Items
summary:
Revenue: $25/item (cost $5), $500 min order; 80% profit margin.
- **Time to first $**: 2 days (list on Fiverr).
- **First action**: List on Fiverr titled "Custom Holographic Promotional Items - 48h Delivery."
- **Risk**: Low startup interest (mitigated by targeting startups with >$50k funding via Serper).
